role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund is ETF that seeks to achieve its investment objective primarily through managed exposure to corn futures contracts that trade only on an exchange registered with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission, and cash, cash-like instruments or high-quality securities that serve as collateral to the fund’s investments in Corn Futures Contracts. The fund is non-diversified.
